title: hush... - Horror Modpack
description: a horror modpack based on the mod "The Silence"
body:
A challenging horror modpack based on the mod The Silence
Features

  • 👻 The Silence - Get scared by monsters and jumpscares.
  • ⚫ Darkness - Caves are now pitch black. Make sure to bring torches.
  • 📷 Camera - The camera has been overhauled, now there is realistic camera movement.
  • 🌲 Ambience - The ambient sounds have been changed for better immersion.
  • 🔊 Sound Physics - The sound physics have been improved, now there is echo in caves.

The Insanity Shader is required for the modpack

Changelog
  • Changed Description.
  • Added Banner.
Included
  • Alternative Rain Sounds - New sounds for rain and thunder
  • AmbientSounds - #listentonature
  • Camera Overhaul Reforged - Makes gameplay more satisfying through the use of various camera tilting. Configurable.
  • Cloth Config API - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
  • CreativeCore - A core mod
  • Dynamic Lights - Supported entities and items such as torches or lanterns emit light! Server-side only!
  • Embeddium - A powerful, mod-friendly, FOSS client performance mod for NeoForge
  • Enhanced Audio (Sound Pack) - Changes Minecraft's sounds with a new style of more realistic sounds.
  • Entity Culling - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible
  • FerriteCore - Memory usage optimizations
  • Fresh Animations - Make your game like the trailers! Dynamic animated entities to freshen your Minecraft experience.
  • Fresh Moves - This is a Player Animation texture pack for forge and fabric, it uses ETF and EMF, it works with many mods that use animations for your character like emotes, for example Parcool, Quark, Better Combat, Essential...
  • Geckolib - A 3D animation library for entities, blocks, items, armor, and more!
  • Hourglass - Beds accelerate the passage of time smoothly until daytime. Custom day and night lengths.
  • ImmediatelyFast - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
  • Nyf's Spiders - Modifes spiders to be more realistic
  • Oculus - Unofficial Fork of "Iris", made to work with FML
  • Rain Revamp - This pack changes the saturation of the rain so it becomes a more mute color instead of that strong default blue, this way it is more similar to the rain you see in real life.
  • Sound Physics Remastered - A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.
  • Starlight (Forge) - Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors
  • The Silence - THE SILENCE - MINECRAFT HORROR MOD
  • True Darkness [Forge] - Updated Fork - An unofficial fork of the 'True Darkness' mod for 1.20.1 Forge
  • [EMF] Entity Model Features - EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge.
  • [ETF] Entity Texture Features - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric
